title: ArtifactCitation Collection
description: Array of ArtifactCitation records. Each element: Citation counts for a single artifact DOI, aggregated from OpenAlex and Semantic Scholar.

ArtifactCitation.description: Citation counts for a single artifact DOI, aggregated from OpenAlex and Semantic Scholar.

title.description: Full paper title as it appears in the proceedings.
examples: Understanding and Detecting Software Upgrade Failures in Distributed Systems
title.title: Title

doi.description: Artifact DOI, e.g. '10.5281/zenodo.12345'. Empty string if not found.
doi.title: Doi

doi_source.description: Source of the DOI, e.g. 'zenodo', 'figshare'. Empty string if not applicable.
doi_source.title: Doi Source

cited_by_count.description: Best citation count: max(OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar). Null if neither source returned data.
cited_by_count.title: Cited By Count

citations_openalex.description: Citation count from OpenAlex. Null if lookup failed or no data.
citations_openalex.title: Citations Openalex

citations_semantic_scholar.description: Citation count from Semantic Scholar. Null if lookup failed or no data.
citations_semantic_scholar.title: Citations Semantic Scholar

citing_dois_openalex.description: DOIs of papers citing this artifact, sourced from OpenAlex. Empty list if none.
citing_dois_openalex.title: Citing Dois Openalex

citing_dois_semantic_scholar.description: DOIs of papers citing this artifact, sourced from Semantic Scholar. Empty list if none.
citing_dois_semantic_scholar.title: Citing Dois Semantic Scholar

ArtifactCitation.title: ArtifactCitation
